page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on the Arm64-based Alibaba Yitian 710 processor, operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz. The CPU architecture allocates one thread per core and provides 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across most compute and memory operations. The system achieved a PassMark CPU score of 12,841.95 and a stress-ng multi-core CPU performance score of 28,931.82. Memory performance is a notable strength, with a PassMark memory score categorized in the top 25% at 2,888.01, supported by a read-only small block memory bandwidth of 1,634.24 GB/sec. However, cryptographic performance is a relative weakness, as demonstrated by a PassMark CPU encryption test score of 2,628.18, which falls into the bottom 25%.

For specialized workloads, the instance processes small-model LLM inference at 774.39 tokens per second for prompts and 195.16 tokens per second for text generation. Performance drops significantly on larger models, with medium-model prompt processing falling into the bottom 25% at 21.31 tokens per second. The instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, web serving, database operations, and multi-threaded decompression tasks, but is less optimal for heavy cryptographic processing or large-scale language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.4xlarge is an Arm64-based general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on the 2.75 GHz Alibaba Yitian 710 processor. It is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU accelerators. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers balanced performance, highlighted by a strong PassMark memory score in the top 25%. However, benchmarks reveal a relative weakness in cryptographic operations, with the PassMark encryption test falling into the bottom 25%. The instance demonstrates average performance in database operations, static web serving, and small-model LLM inference. It is suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, and multi-threaded decompression tasks, though it is less efficient for heavy cryptographic workloads or larger language model processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.4xlarge is an Arm64 instance with 16 dedicated Yitian 710 cores and 64 GB RAM, offering balanced general-purpose performance with strong memory bandwidth but weaker encryption speeds.

tagline: An Arm64-powered virtual machine offering balanced compute and strong memory bandwidth for general-purpose workloads and web serving.

64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage.
